firewall_endpoint.description: The URL of the firewall endpoint that is being associated.

network.description: The URL of the network that is being associated.

name.description: The name of the firewall endpoint association resource.

location.description: The location (zone) of the firewall endpoint association.

tls_inspection_policy.description: The URL of the TlsInspectionPolicy that is being associated.

labels.description: A map of key/value label pairs to assign to the resource. **Note**: This field is non-authoritative, and will only manage the labels present in your configuration. Please refer to the field `effective_labels` for all of the labels present on the resource.

disabled.description: Whether the association is disabled. True indicates that traffic will not be intercepted. ~> **Note:** The API will reject the request if this value is set to true when creating the resource, otherwise on an update the association can be disabled.

parent.description: The name of the parent this firewall endpoint association belongs to. Format: projects/{project_id}.
